TestCase z64Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_array2 = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_array2, t1.array2, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.array2 = follow_case_array2;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation: divide elements at composite indices by 2 (when not zero)
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        bool isComposite = false;
        if (i > 1) {
            for (int d = 2; d * d <= i; ++d) {
                if (i % d == 0) {
                    isComposite = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        if (isComposite && follow_case.array2[i] != 0) {
            follow_case.array2[i] = follow_case.array2[i] / 2;
        }
    }

    return follow_case;
}
